@babel/core.lock-reason: Keep Babel on version 7 because Jest/Bun currently resolves Babel 7 transformer internals that are incompatible with Babel 8 presets.

@babel/preset-typescript.lock-reason: Keep Babel on version 7 because Jest/Bun currently resolves Babel 7 transformer internals that are incompatible with Babel 8 presets.
